APPROVE
Clean implementation matching the AC. Resolution precedence, "-" disable semantics, and silent-inert default are all covered by tests. The public re-export keeps agentcli within the existing import allowlist, and LoadSkillTool correctly implements agent.Tool with helpful error messages.
